```{r Validation rule 16: SSI date outside enrolment window}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$enrollments |>
      dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key", "enrolledAt") |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "adm") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "admOccurredAt" = "occurredAt"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "end") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "endOccurredAt" = "occurredAt"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "ssi") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "event_key", "ssiOccurredAt" = "occurredAt"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$ssiOccurredAt < .data$enrolledAt |
                    .data$ssiOccurredAt < .data$admOccurredAt |
                    .data$ssiOccurredAt > .data$endOccurredAt) |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 16L),
        dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
      tidyr::nest(context = c("enrolledAt", "admOccurredAt", "endOccurredAt", "ssiOccurredAt")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 16L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = .data$event_key,
        context        = .data$context,
        .keep = "none"))
```
